scripts.build:exe: npm run build && cross-env BUILD_TARGET=dir electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:installer: npm run build:exe && node scripts/generate-installer-assets.js && node scripts/patch-nsis-target.js && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder-installer.config.cjs
scripts.build:installer:secure: npm run build && node scripts/secure-build.js && node scripts/generate-installer-assets.js && node scripts/patch-nsis-target.js && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder-installer.config.cjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build:exe && node scripts/generate-installer-assets.js && node scripts/patch-nsis-target.js && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder-installer.config.cjs
scripts.build:bundle: npm run build && node scripts/secure-build.js && node scripts/create-app-bundle.js
scripts.build:update:secure: npm run build && node scripts/secure-build.js && node scripts/create-update-package.js
